task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Apple iPhone 16 Pro (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $999.00 and wholesale is $839.00. Product features: Smartphone with A16 Bionic chip and ProMotion display. Reference: https://www.apple.com/iphone-16-pro/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Apple iPhone 16 Pro. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Apple iPhone 16 Pro. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
